heading: Termination of service of Members of House
label: 5327 Termination of service of Members of House
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 92b–1 of this titleSection is based on section 1 of House Resolution 804, Ninety-sixth Congress, , as enacted into permanent law by H.R. 4120, as reported , which was enacted into permanent law by .Oct. 2, 1980July 9, 1981section 101(c) of Pub. L. 97–51

children.label: a
children.text: Until otherwise provided by law, for purposes of sections 5324, 5325, and 5326 of this title, any termination of service during a term of office of a Member of the House that is not described in shall be treated as if such termination were described in such section.section 5324 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The Clerk of the House shall take such action as may be necessary to apply the principles of in the carrying out of sections 5327 to 5329 of this title.section 5325 of this title
